top.title: Hantavirus may have spread between passengers on cruise ship, WHO says
top.summary: Two cases of the virus, which rarely spreads between humans, have been confirmed on the ship, and three people have died.

top.title: Zelensky condemns Russian 'utter cynicism' as it strikes ahead of truce
top.summary: Russia demanded a ceasefire on 8 and 9 May but Ukraine said it would pause the fighting sooner, meaning any violations would be pinned on Moscow.

top.title: Nine coal miners die in gas explosion in Colombia
top.summary: The explosion is the latest accident in the locality of Sutatausa, the site of another deadly mine disaster in 2023.

top.title: Pornhub to become accessible again for some UK users
top.summary: UK iPhone users who have completed Apple's device-based age checks will no longer be blocked from the site's adult content.

top.title: Oscars says AI actors and writing cannot win awards
top.summary: The academy that controls the Oscars on Friday issued new award eligibility requirements around the use of artificial intelligence in film.

top.title: Bright idea? UK firm pioneers data centres using lampposts
top.summary: The solar-powered iLamps will have a built-in Nvidia chip but there are questions over their security and scalability.
